EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-03-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-05-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-24-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY TINKHAM, MATTHEW AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERA, RUDY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-24-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-05-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-05-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF MATTHEW TINKHAM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RUDY RIVERA IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TINKHAM, MATTHEW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIVERA, RUDY $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,600.00, FOR SECURITY DEPOSIT $1000, BAD FAITH FOR WITHHELD SECURITY DEPOSIT $2000, ADDITIONAL DAMAGES $500. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF TINKHAM, MATTHEW
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-05-2019 - JUDGMENT.
